description_long: A young adult male is depicted mid-stride, holding a smartphone to his ear with his right hand, suggesting he is engaged in a phone conversation. He is dressed in a loose, long-sleeved sweatshirt with slightly dropped shoulders and fitted cuffs, paired with slim-fit jeans that taper at the ankles. His footwear consists of low-profile sneakers, and his overall attire is casual and suitable for an urban environment. The figure's facial features are well-defined, and his hair is neatly trimmed and short. The posture and stride indicate movement, as if he is walking along a sidewalk or street. The model captures realistic body proportions and naturalistic clothing folds, enhancing its lifelike appearance.
description: A casually dressed young man walks while talking on a smartphone, wearing a sweatshirt, slim jeans, and sneakers. His posture and attire suggest a relaxed, urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the man's face, phone held to his ear, and full details of his sweatshirt and jeans.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the sweatshirt, jeans, and the man's stride, with his head turned slightly to the left.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the profile of his face, the phone at his ear, and the natural drape of his clothing.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the man's face, hand holding the phone, and the symmetry of his walking posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeved sweatshirt and slim-fit jeans
attribute_posture: walking with one hand holding a phone to the ear
